name: flutter_devtools_mcp
description: MCP server for Flutter UI automation via VM Service extensions. Connect to running Flutter debug apps — inspect the widget tree, tap, scroll, type, screenshot, and more.

tools.name: connect
tools.description: Connect to a running Flutter debug app — pass the VM Service URL from flutter run output, or omit to auto-discover via mDNS. Use this instead of Dart Tooling Daemon (DTD) tools.

tools.name: discover
tools.description: Scan for running Flutter debug apps via mDNS and return their VM Service URLs.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Check connection status and detect running Flutter apps via mDNS.

tools.name: launch
tools.description: Launch a Flutter app in debug mode — starts flutter run as subprocess and auto-connects. After launch succeeds, call widget_tree to inspect the UI.

tools.name: launch_status
tools.description: Check status of the most recently launched app process.

tools.name: stop_app
tools.description: Stop a running app launched via the launch tool.

tools.name: widget_tree
tools.description: Get the current widget tree as structured JSON — every widget, its type, label, key, bounds, and children. Use this to see what is on screen. Also known as: snapshot.

tools.name: inspect
tools.description: Get detailed properties of a specific widget node by its ID (from widget_tree).

tools.name: get_parent_chain
tools.description: Get ancestor chain from a widget node up to root — useful for understanding layout context.

tools.name: get_render_tree
tools.description: Dump the render object tree as text — shows layout constraints, sizes, paint info.

tools.name: get_layer_tree
tools.description: Dump the compositing layer tree as text — diagnose saveLayer and opacity overhead.

tools.name: dump_semantics
tools.description: Dump the accessibility/semantics tree in traversal order.

tools.name: tap
tools.description: Tap a widget by selector (semantics:, key:, text:, index:). Required: connect first.

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Focus a text field by selector then enter text. Required: connect first.

tools.name: scroll
tools.description: Scroll a scrollable widget in a direction. Required: connect first.

tools.name: press_back
tools.description: Pop the top route from the navigator stack. Required: connect first.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture screen as PNG image — use this to see what the app looks like visually. NOT the widget tree. Required: connect first.

tools.name: hot_reload
tools.description: Trigger hot reload on the connected app. Required: connect first.

tools.name: hot_restart
tools.description: Trigger full hot restart (reassemble) — resets state. Required: connect first.

tools.name: evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate a Dart expression in the running app. Required: connect first.

tools.name: get_errors
tools.description: Get Flutter framework errors from the running app. Required: connect first.

tools.name: get_logs
tools.description: Capture recent app output (stdout, stderr, log()). Required: connect first.

tools.name: get_memory
tools.description: Get memory usage of the app's main isolate (heap, external). Required: connect first.

tools.name: toggle_dark_mode
tools.description: Toggle between light and dark mode. Required: connect first.

tools.name: toggle_platform
tools.description: Override target platform (android, ios, fuchsia, linux, macos, windows). Required: connect first.

tools.name: toggle_debug_paint
tools.description: Toggle widget boundary overlay — shows padding and alignment. Required: connect first.

tools.name: toggle_repaint_rainbow
tools.description: Toggle repaint rainbow — identifies widgets that repaint too frequently. Required: connect first.

tools.name: toggle_slow_animations
tools.description: Slow down or restore animation speed (1.0=normal, 5.0=5x slower). Required: connect first.

tools.name: toggle_performance_overlay
tools.description: Toggle frame timing graphs (UI and raster thread). Required: connect first.

tools.name: track_rebuilds
tools.description: Toggle widget rebuild tracking. Required: connect first.

tools.name: track_repaints
tools.description: Toggle repaint tracking. Required: connect first.
